ast.name: LiquidatableLoan

functions.name: __covenant_policy_repay

exprs.span: { borrower: prev_states[0].borrower, liquidator: prev_states[0].liquidator, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt - amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio, liquidated: prev_states[0].liquidated }

data.span: return({ borrower: prev_states[0].borrower, liquidator: prev_states[0].liquidator, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt - amount, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio, liquidated: prev_states[0].liquidated });

__covenant_policy_liquidate

data.span: return({ borrower: prev_states[0].borrower, liquidator: prev_states[0].liquidator, collateral: prev_states[0].collateral, debt: prev_states[0].debt, min_ratio: prev_states[0].min_ratio, liquidated: 1 });
